description: Per-real CLUTRR kinship extraction records carrying the K=5 self-consistency rank-normalized real score (z_real_sc), its counterfactual-decoy score (z_decoy_sc), the signed-max knockoff competition statistic W (w_cf_sc), the swap-decoy W (w_swap_sc), the raw confidence (z_real_raw_sc) for the plain baseline, and the crisp gold label (output: TRUE/FALSE). These are the cached scores the FDR calibration diagonal is computed from — no API calls needed.

hyperparameters.knockoff_plus: Barber-Candes eq 1.9 (the +1 kept; exact FDR control)

primary_disconfirmation_verdict.reason: realized FDR 1.0 > alpha*+tau (0.5+0.05) AND doc-block CI [0.661594,1.0] lies entirely above alpha*=0.5.
